```plantuml
@startuml

actor "Web User" as WU
boundary "index" as idx
boundary "Main.view" as mv
boundary "Image.View" as iv
control "ImageController" as ic
entity "DB" as db
entity "DBE" as dbe
entity "ImageModel" as im
entity "images" as imgs
database "Images" as Images

WU -> idx : 1:Need to see some Pictures
idx -> ic : 1:1 new ImageController( new DB ( DBE ) )
ic -> db : new DB ( BDE::MySQL)
db -> dbe : getDNS(); getUser(); getPass()
ic -> Images : ImageController->fetchAll() : $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare(SELECT id,filename,title,description FROM images)
ic -> Images : ImageController->fetchAll() :  $stmt ->execute()
Images --> ic : $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_CLASS, ImageModel::class)
ic --> idx : 1:0|1|* $images array
idx -> mv : render ()
mv --> idx : + layout
idx --> WU : he/she dont know how many work it was ;-)

@enduml
```
